memoryArtifacts.headline: He was a cloth maker
memoryArtifacts.description: He was a cloth maker, as his father was, so was his son.

popularStory.headline: JJohn Barker was probably born in 1563 in Nayland, Suffolk, England
popularStory.description: JJohn Barker was probably born in 1563 in Nayland, Suffolk, England and baptised there on April 30, 1563. His parents were John Barker and Margaret Maull or Mawle. His father was a cloth maker, and Jo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barker於1540年6月22日出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，他的父親Richard Barker34歲，母親Alice Kinge30歲。他於1562年5月26日與Margaret Mawle在英國素福爾可納易藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和12個女兒的父母。他去世於1588年10月19日在英國素福爾可納易藍德享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Barker于1540年6月22日出生在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德时，他的父亲Richard Barker34岁，母亲Alice Kinge30岁。他于1562年5月26日与Margaret Mawle在英国素福爾可納易藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和12个女儿的父母。他去世于1588年10月19日在英国素福爾可納易藍德享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Barker was born on 22 June 1540, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, Richard Barker, was 34 and his mother, Alice Kinge, was 30. He married Margaret Mawle on 26 May 1562, in Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 12 daughters. He died on 19 October 1588, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barker est né le 22 juin 1540, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Barker, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Kinge, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mawle le 26 mai 1562, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 12 filles. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1588, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Barker am 22. Juni 1540 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Barker 34 und seine Mutter Alice Kinge 30. Er hat am 26. Mai 1562 in Nayland, Suffolk, England Margaret Mawle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1588 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Nayland, Suffolk, England und wurde in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Barker è nato il il 22 giugno 1540 nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Richard Barker, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Kinge, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Mawle il 26 maggio 1562, nel Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1588, nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barkerが1540年6月22日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで生まれた時，父Richard Barkerは34歳，母Alice Kingeは30歳であった。1562年5月26日にイギリススフォルクナイランドでMargaret Mawleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼は1588年10月19日にイギリススフォルクナイランドで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Barker(이)가 1540년 6월 22일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Barker(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Kinge(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1562년 5월 26일 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 Margaret Mawle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1588년 10월 19일 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.22 June 1540–19 October 1588: 22 de junho de 1540–19 de outubro de 1588
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Barker nasceu em 22 de junho de 1540, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Barker, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Kinge, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mawle em 26 de maio de 1562, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 12 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1588, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barker родился 22 июня 1540 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Barker было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Kinge, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mawle 26 мая 1562 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Он умер 19 октября 1588 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.22 June 1540–19 October 1588: 22 de junio de 1540–19 de octubre de 1588
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Barker nació el 22 de junio de 1540, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Barker, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Kinge, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Mawle el 26 de mayo de 1562, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1588, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
